name: Patrice Rushen
description: American jazz pianist and R&B singer
abstract: Patrice Louise Rushen (born September 30, 1954) is an American jazz pianist, R&B singer, record producer, multi-instrumentalist, songwriter, and music director. At the 25th Annual Grammy Awards, her 1982 single, "Forget Me Nots", received a nomination for Best Female R&B Vocal Performance, while her instrumental song, "Number One" was no…

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Sondheim and Jazz - Side by Side
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: They’ve got Herbie Hancock. They’ve got T. S. Monk. They’ve got Patrice Rushen. They’ve got Barry Harris. They’ve got Ron Carter.
